design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. The interface must feel like a high-performance command center. Eliminate the boring purple/pink gradient and replace it with a hyper-focused, distraction-free environment. Contrast and typography are the primary structural elements.

scales.typing_area: text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl leading-relaxed font-medium tracking-wide

bento_grid.wpm_hero_card: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 row-span-2 bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-center items-center relative overflow-hidden
bento_grid.stats_card: col-span-1 border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] p-6 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between
bento_grid.chart_card: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] p-6 rounded-xl h-64 mt-6

typing_area.description: The hero component. A distraction-free zone.
typing_area.caret: A solid block or thick underline in Volt Blue (#007AFF). Must have smooth transition tracking using framer-motion (transition-all duration-100 ease-out) and a blinking animation when idle.

mode_selector.description: Tactical pill toggles to select time (15/30/60) or words (10/25/50).
mode_selector.style: Neumorphic / Technical. bg-zinc-900 rounded-full p-1 inline-flex gap-1 border border-white/5
mode_selector.item_active: bg-zinc-800 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium shadow-sm transition-all
mode_selector.item_inactive: text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all

hud.description: Live stats during typing. Must be unobtrusive.
hud.style: Flex container above or below the typing area. Uses the 'labels' typography for titles and 'hud_stats' for values. Opacity decreases when actively typing to prevent distraction.

buttons.primary: bg-accent-primary text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent-primary_hover transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,122,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,122,255,0.5)] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-400 focus:outline-none
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-600 focus:outline-none
buttons.restart_action: Tab + Enter shortcut explicitly shown. Ghost button style but circular icon focus.

results_screen.description: Shown after test completion. High visual reward.
results_screen.chart: Use Recharts. Line chart with neon blue stroke (#007AFF), gradient fill (from-blue-500/20 to-transparent), hide grid lines, simple tooltip.
results_screen.celebration: Use a subtle particle effect (tsparticles or react-confetti with dark-theme friendly colors like gold/blue/white) if WPM > Personal Best.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade in typing area with a slight Y translation (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).
motion_and_interactions.results_reveal: Staggered bento grid reveal. (delay 0.1s per card).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) and brighten.
motion_and_interactions.typing_feedback: Subtle error shake animation on the caret or word if an entire word is submitted wrong.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 ratio against the deep obsidian background.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus states for keyboard navigation on all interactive elements (buttons, toggles).
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the caret tracking and results animations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='mode-selector-15s', data-testid='restart-button').

frontend: Framer Motion (for caret and layout animations)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install JetBrains Mono and Outfit fonts from Google Fonts in the global CSS.

Implement the typing engine with a robust state: tracking untyped, correct, and incorrect strokes. Create an absolute positioned caret that updates its x/y coordinates based on the current character's DOM rect.
Build the bento grid layout for the results screen using pure Tailwind HTML/CSS classes provided in the spacing_and_layout section.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards for the main typing game area; use raw divs with the defined 'Technical' surface strategies to achieve the minimal look.
Ensure the typing input captures global keydown events without requiring a visible input field (or use a hidden input field that maintains focus).
